summary: Explanation cache module-level Map leaks across sessions — clearExplanationCache() never called
details: Module-level `const cache = new Map<string, Explanation>()` persists across session boundaries. `clearExplanationCache()` exists as exported function but is never called anywhere. Fix: scoped cache key to include sessionId.

summary: GlobalBus subscriber exception kills remaining downstream listeners
details: Single try/catch around super.emit(). Node.js EventEmitter calls listeners synchronously. If listener N throws, listeners N+1..M never run. Fix: iterate rawListeners and invoke each in individual try/catch.

summary: Campaign orchestrator store uses Ref.create+get+set — TOCTOU race between concurrent transitions
details: `Ref.make<Map<...>>()` with `Ref.get`→modify→`Ref.set` pattern allows interleaving between two concurrent `updateState` calls. Fix: use `SynchronizedRef` with atomic `modify`/`update`.

summary: Processor finishToolCall has TOCTOU race at yield point between done check and mutation
details: finishToolCall checks `call.done` on potentially stale reference, then yields at `yield* readToolCall(...)`. A concurrent fiber can pass the same check during the yield. Fix: re-check `match.done` after the yield point.
